---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a data contribution
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Pressing-reputation data?**
If you're proposing a new audiophile label / mastering engineer / stamper signal, see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) — those are great PRs. Include the Discogs label id and a
one-line rationale.

**Why is it useful?**
